name: Jacob Doyle
intel:
^Physical Description^
*General:* Athletic male with balanced musculature typical of long-range reconnaissance operators. Upright posture and steady stance even during extended static positioning.
*Hair:* Light brown, typically worn medium length when not deployed.
*Eyes:* Blue; noted by observers to display intense focus when assessing terrain or targets.
*Presence:* Maintains calm but alert demeanor in operational environments.

^Body Marks^
*Tattoos:* Large geometric blackwork tattoo covering the anterior neck and extending toward the collarbone.
*Tattoos:* Black geometric band tattoo on the right forearm.
*Personal Item:* Wears a necklace containing a |spent rifle casing|, reportedly from a childhood hunting accident.

^Biography^
Jacob "Bluejay" Doyle was born in Canada and grew up in a rural environment where hunting and firearms use were common. He began handling rifles at age seven under parental supervision and quickly developed an intense fascination with firearm mechanics and marksmanship.

At age twelve, Doyle accidentally discharged a hunting rifle that struck his father during a trip in wooded terrain. The injury was severe but non-fatal. The incident had a lasting psychological impact on Doyle, who reportedly kept the spent casing from the round and later wore it as a necklace as a personal reminder of the responsibility of firing a weapon.

Following the event, Doyle became intensely focused on mastering rifle discipline. His marksmanship skills advanced rapidly during adolescence, eventually leading to recruitment and advanced sniper training connected with Canadian special operations structures.

Doyle later served with elements of |Joint Task Force 2| during training and field rotations and was deployed twice alongside marine expeditionary units in overwatch and counter-sniper roles.

As of 2047 he operates as a contract precision sniper under the |ECAF| operational structure.

^Last Seen^
Location: |Undisclosed Forward Operating Base|
Date: 2047 (Operational Cycle Ongoing)
Status confirmed through recent mission reports indicating active field deployment under ECAF command.

|Status: ACTIVE OPERATOR|

^Medical Evaluation^
<blue>Physical Condition:<blue> Excellent overall health with no recorded chronic injuries.
<green>Cardiovascular Endurance:<green> Above-average tolerance for long overwatch periods exceeding 12 hours.
<ochre>Motor Control:<ochre> Exceptional fine motor stability during weapon handling.

^Psychological Profile^
*Baseline:* Disciplined and focused personality.
*Key Trait:* Strong internal rule regarding firearm responsibility.
*Behavior Pattern:* Performs extensive pre-shot verification before firing.
*Stress Response:* Remains controlled under pressure with minimal emotional fluctuation.

^Other Intel^
*Specialization:* Long-range precision shooting and overwatch support.
*Weapon Preference:* Bolt-action sniper platforms and suppressed DMR rifles.
*Operational Reputation:* Highly reliable marksman known for patience and careful target confirmation.

<green>Assessment:<green> Operator considered a dependable precision asset with strong discipline in weapon handling and engagement authorization.
